channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: The Unsinkable Triumph of the Bristol Bears Women 2026 Season

item.description: From the grandest naval battle to the quiet ambition of women's rugby development in Kenya, history hums with tales of strategic alliances.

item.title: Inside Court Ruling on Kenya-US Health Data Agreement
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The High Court blocked COFEK from withdrawing a petition against the Kenya-US health data agreement to protect public interest and privacy. Read more.
item.content:encoded: The High Court blocked COFEK from withdrawing a petition against the Kenya-US health data agreement to protect public interest and privacy. Read more.

item.title: Kenya to Extend Mandatory Alcohol Tracking to Curb KSh 120 Billion Tax Loss
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi
item.description: Curbing Illicit Alcohol to Recover KSh 120 Billion in Tax Revenue Kenya plans to extend mandatory excise stamps to all alcoholic beverages, including second-generation brews, to curb an estimated KSh 120 billion annual tax loss from illicit trade. This...
item.content:encoded: Curbing Illicit Alcohol to Recover KSh 120 Billion in Tax Revenue Kenya plans to extend mandatory excise stamps to all alcoholic beverages, including second-generation brews, to curb an estimated KSh 120 billion annual tax loss from illicit trade. This...

item.title: Confirmed: Mike Sonko Acquitted in Money Laundering Case
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Nairobi court acquits Mike Sonko of money laundering charges due to lack of evidence but orders him to defend irregular tenders. Read the full story.
item.content:encoded: Nairobi court acquits Mike Sonko of money laundering charges due to lack of evidence but orders him to defend irregular tenders. Read the full story.

item.title: Confirmed: IG Kanja Secures Nairobi-Garissa Highway

item.title: Confirmed: Kenya electricity prices to drop as hydro dams fill
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: KenGen signals a drop in Kenya electricity prices for homes and firms as water levels rise in major hydro dams nationwide. Get the full details now.
item.content:encoded: KenGen signals a drop in Kenya electricity prices for homes and firms as water levels rise in major hydro dams nationwide. Get the full details now.

item.title: Heavy rains submerge Nairobi estates and render major roads impassable

item.title: Michael Jackson biopic earns $217.4 million in global box office opening
item.dc:creator: Amara Ndlovu
item.description: Michael Jackson's biopic 'Michael' achieved a $217.4 million global box office opening in 2026, leading cinema charts across 82 markets and North America.
item.content:encoded: Michael Jackson's biopic 'Michael' achieved a $217.4 million global box office opening in 2026, leading cinema charts across 82 markets and North America.

item.title: European Commission challenges Meta over ban on third-party AI assistants on WhatsApp
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Muthoni
item.description: WhatsApp's AI Assistant Ban: Europe's Stance and African Tech's Future The European Commission is challenging Meta over its ban on third-party AI assistants on WhatsApp. This regulatory scrutiny, aimed at restoring open access for competing AI services, holds...
item.content:encoded: WhatsApp's AI Assistant Ban: Europe's Stance and African Tech's Future The European Commission is challenging Meta over its ban on third-party AI assistants on WhatsApp. This regulatory scrutiny, aimed at restoring open access for competing AI services, holds...

item.title: Bare Sahara's 'Nywele Ngumu' Drama: DCI Says She's Not Going Anywhere, Court 2026!
item.dc:creator: Zed Mogaka
item.description: DCI confirms Bare Sahara Ahmed remains in custody after arrest for viral inflammatory remarks. She is scheduled to face charges in court today, April 27, 2026.
item.content:encoded: DCI confirms Bare Sahara Ahmed remains in custody after arrest for viral inflammatory remarks. She is scheduled to face charges in court today, April 27, 2026.

item.title: UEFA Ownership Crisis: Why Premier League Giants Could Be Banned From Europe
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: UEFA’s crackdown on multi-club ownership puts Premier League giants at risk. Learn why top teams could face a ban from European tournaments.
item.content:encoded: UEFA’s crackdown on multi-club ownership puts Premier League giants at risk. Learn why top teams could face a ban from European tournaments.

item.title: Rigathi Gachagua launches legal challenge to overturn his impeachment
item.dc:creator: Za Ndani
item.description: Rigathi Gachagua has initiated a legal challenge to overturn his 2026 removal from office, describing his impeachment as both fraudulent and illegal.
item.content:encoded: Rigathi Gachagua has initiated a legal challenge to overturn his 2026 removal from office, describing his impeachment as both fraudulent and illegal.

item.title: NTSA orders mandatory inspection of school transport vehicles ahead of term two
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: NTSA orders mandatory inspections for all school transport vehicles before term two begins under the Watoto Wafike Salama drive to enhance student safety.
item.content:encoded: NTSA orders mandatory inspections for all school transport vehicles before term two begins under the Watoto Wafike Salama drive to enhance student safety.

item.title: Kenya Power announces scheduled maintenance outages in Nairobi, Bomet and Nandi counties
item.dc:creator: Za Ndani
item.description: Kenya Power schedules maintenance outages for Nairobi, Bomet and Nandi counties on Monday, April 27, 2026, impacting popular social and economic hubs.
item.content:encoded: Kenya Power schedules maintenance outages for Nairobi, Bomet and Nandi counties on Monday, April 27, 2026, impacting popular social and economic hubs.

item.title: President Ruto appoints 37 judges to the High Court and Environment and Land Court
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: President William Ruto appoints 37 judges to the High Court and Environment and Land Court to expedite justice and tackle the nation's judicial backlog.
item.content:encoded: President William Ruto appoints 37 judges to the High Court and Environment and Land Court to expedite justice and tackle the nation's judicial backlog.

item.title: EPRA adds foreign exchange and water resource levies to electricity bills
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: EPRA introduces three new levies to electricity bills starting April 2026, covering foreign exchange, water resource management, and fuel costs for all consumer
item.content:encoded: EPRA introduces three new levies to electricity bills starting April 2026, covering foreign exchange, water resource management, and fuel costs for all consumer

item.title: Odhiambo na Consolata Kileleshwa B&B: Hadithi ya CCTV, Siri Nzito Inayochanganya Wakenya!
item.dc:creator: Zed Mogaka
item.description: An alleged disturbing incident at Kileleshwa B&B, involving Odhiambo and Consolata Githinji, fuels Nairobi speculation. Alleged CCTV: 4:17 entry, 4:32 commotion

item.title: Kenya's electricity bills rise by KSh 4.72 per kilowatt-hour amid fuel crisis
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi

item.title: President Ruto announces dualling of Makutano-Meru highway under National Infrastructure Fund
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: President Ruto announced the dualling of the 169km Makutano-Meru highway through the National Infrastructure Fund to boost trade between Meru and Nairobi.
item.content:encoded: President Ruto announced the dualling of the 169km Makutano-Meru highway through the National Infrastructure Fund to boost trade between Meru and Nairobi.

item.title: Bare Sahara's Viral Rant: DCI Pulls Her Plug!

item.content:encoded: Bare Sahara Ahmed was apprehended by DCI on April 26, 2026, following a viral video with alleged inciteful remarks threatening national cohesion.

item.title: Kisumu Court issues notice for destruction of old case records
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Kisumu Court plans to destroy old criminal records (2016-2018) and civil files (2008-2010), giving the public a three-month window starting April 2026.
item.content:encoded: Kisumu Court plans to destroy old criminal records (2016-2018) and civil files (2008-2010), giving the public a three-month window starting April 2026.

item.title: Gladys Wanga states ODM seeks 50 percent power share with UDA, proposes Joho for Deputy President
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka

item.content:encoded: ODM chairperson Gladys Wanga seeks a 50 percent power share with UDA and proposes Hassan Joho for Deputy President ahead of the 2027 General Election.

item.title: Murkomen declares parts of Marsabit County security-disturbed over rising insecurity
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka

item.content:encoded: Interior CS Kipchumba Murkomen declares parts of Marsabit County security-disturbed for 30 days to tackle escalating banditry and inter-communal violence.

item.title: Megan Thee Stallion announces split from Klay Thompson following allegations of infidelity

item.title: KHRC Sues UDA Over Alleged Tax Evasion and Misuse of Funds
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: KHRC sues the UDA party for allegedly evading Ksh69 million in taxes and misusing public funds, following failures to remit PAYE on staff salaries.
item.content:encoded: KHRC sues the UDA party for allegedly evading Ksh69 million in taxes and misusing public funds, following failures to remit PAYE on staff salaries.

item.title: Ghai Garissa! Chief Abdatam Car Blown, Headteacher Vundi Executed At Police Station!
item.dc:creator: Zed Mogaka
item.description: Suspected Al-Shabaab killed Garissa Chief Abdatam Hammud, blowing up his car, and executed abducted Headteacher Steven Vundi at a police station.
item.content:encoded: Suspected Al-Shabaab killed Garissa Chief Abdatam Hammud, blowing up his car, and executed abducted Headteacher Steven Vundi at a police station.

item.title: KRA announces integration of customs data for export VAT returns
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: KRA integrates customs data with the iTax platform to automate export VAT returns effective May 2026, aiming to streamline filings and enhance compliance.
item.content:encoded: KRA integrates customs data with the iTax platform to automate export VAT returns effective May 2026, aiming to streamline filings and enhance compliance.

item.title: Sebastian Sawe sets marathon world record with first official sub-two-hour finish in London
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Sebastian Sawe shattered the world record at the London Marathon, becoming the first man to officially finish in under two hours with a time of 1:59:30.
item.content:encoded: Sebastian Sawe shattered the world record at the London Marathon, becoming the first man to officially finish in under two hours with a time of 1:59:30.

item.title: Police deploy security team to Kitui after seven killed in community clashes
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Police deployed a high-powered security team to Tseikuru, Kitui County, after seven people were killed in clashes between Somali and Kamba communities.
item.content:encoded: Police deployed a high-powered security team to Tseikuru, Kitui County, after seven people were killed in clashes between Somali and Kamba communities.

item.title: Kenya Power Deducts Arrears From Prepaid Token Purchases for Debt Recovery
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Kenya Power is deducting legacy debt arrears from prepaid token purchases for debt recovery, significantly reducing electricity units received by users.
item.content:encoded: Kenya Power is deducting legacy debt arrears from prepaid token purchases for debt recovery, significantly reducing electricity units received by users.

item.title: Suspected bandits kill seven people and burn houses in Kitui
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka

item.title: IEBC schedules Ol Kalou constituency by-election following death of MP David Kiaraho
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: IEBC schedules the Ol Kalou Constituency by-election for July 16, 2026, following the death of MP David Njuguna Kiaraho. The seat was declared vacant.
item.content:encoded: IEBC schedules the Ol Kalou Constituency by-election for July 16, 2026, following the death of MP David Njuguna Kiaraho. The seat was declared vacant.
